Tomlin received a B.A.Sc. (1992) from the University of Waterloo, an M.Sc. (1993) from Imperial College, London, and a Ph.D. (1998) from the University of California, Berkeley. Tomlin received a MacArthur Genius grant in 2006. ©2002-2018 Chess
